name: [GRIDHAND] Reporting Agent - Daily: new leads count + conversion rate → Slack notificatio

gridhand.scenario: Daily: new leads count + conversion rate → Slack notification
gridhand.description: Every morning at 8am, GRIDHAND automatically checks the previous day's leads and conversion rates from your online scheduling tool and CRM, and sends a personalized notification to your Slack channel, providing a clear overview of how many new leads came in and how many were successfully converted into customers, allowing you to quickly assess the effectiveness of your marketing efforts and make data-driven decisions to improve your sales strategy. This daily snapshot helps you stay on top of your business's performance and make adjustments in real-time, such as adjusting your social media ads or follow-up protocols, to optimize your conversion rates and drive more sales. By receiving this timely and actionable insight, you can refine your approach and stay focused on driving growth and revenue for your business.
